message:
if experimental proactive model is true - put sloClassRef and modelProfile in place in VA

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,6 +13,7 @@ metadata:
 spec:
   # OpenAI API compatible name of the model
   modelID: {{ .Values.llmd.modelID | quote }}
+  {{- if .Values.experimentalProactiveModel }}
   # Add SLOs in configmap, add reference to this per model data
   # to avoid duplication and Move to ISOs when available
   sloClassRef:
@@ -58,4 +59,6 @@ spec:
             gamma: "5.2"
             delta: "0.1"
         maxBatchSize: 4
+  {{- end}} 
+   
 {{- end }}
\ No newline at end of file
